title: Three income streams I have never tried
subtitle: A journal prompt set for writing past the dismissal into what is actually possible.
excerpt: A journal prompt set from Week 5 of the MONEY program. Five prompts for listing three income streams you have dismissed, and finding out what is underneath the dismissal.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 5 daily reflection prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to find out which income ideas you have been dismissing and why.

content.text: A journal prompt set from Week 5 of the MONEY program. The instruction to list three streams you have never tried usually produces one real answer and two borrowed dismissals. The prompts go after the real one.
New to journalling as a practice? Read
What income ideas have I heard about in the past year?
Write the list without filtering. Podcast ads, things friends have tried, things you read about once.
Which of those did I put down immediately?
Write the ones you dismissed before thinking them through properly.
For the first idea I dismissed: what was the dismissal?
Write the exact thought. "That only works if..." "I'm not the sort of person who..." "That takes too long to..."
Is the dismissal a fact, or a belief?
Write your answer plainly. What would you need to know to test the belief rather than just repeat it?
What is the one income stream I would try this month if I had to pick one?
Write the one. Not the safe answer: the real answer.
Adapted from the Week 5 daily reflection prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
